BOLT.notes: #451 CLOSED (c1f8da7 ‚Äî product-card standard variant flex-col + sm:order-* response ordering, brand/category truncated single line, size-pill outlined so it no longer collides with CONDITION_COLORS badge; build green). TOP PRIORITY: #453 [P0-SEC] /api/suggest rate-limit. Trace C4811 P0-1 finding: src/app/api/suggest/route.ts proxies Mapy.com with MAPY_API_KEY and has ZERO rate limiting ‚Äî a trivial script can drain the 62,500-call/month free tier and knock out address autocomplete during the launch window. Fix: at top of the GET handler apply checkRateLimit("suggest:" + ip, 30, 60_000) from src/lib/rate-limit.ts (same pattern already used in /api/upload and /api/admin/jarvis); return 429 with JSON error body + Retry-After header on exceed. Derive ip from request.headers.get('x-forwarded-for')?.split(',')[0]?.trim() with '127.0.0.1' fallback. Acceptance: tsc clean, next build green, one-file change (no schema, no new deps), atomic commit. After #453: no queued Bolt items ‚Äî go idle and await next Lead cycle. Do NOT touch #367 Trace lane. Do NOT start Hetzner.
